title: Talking Tables White and Gold Number 40 Birthday Candles for Cakes, Cake Topper Decoration, Premium Quality, One and Six Candles, Anniversary Party, Milestone Age, 5.5 cm Height, Recycled Packaging
features: Talking Tables White and Gold Number 40 Birthday Candles for Cakes, Cake Topper Decoration, Premium Quality, One and Six Candles, Anniversary Party, Milestone Age, 5.5 cm Height, Recycled Packaging

Whether it's a birthday, a milestone, or ruby and golden anniversaries, our premium number candles are ideal for marking special birthdays and significant anniversaries. Dipped in gold, they create a stunning two-tone effect for a touch of luxury.
ECO: ALL Talking Tables products are made to be either reusable or home recyclable and this include both product and packaging!
QUALITY- Our products are made to the highest quality standard and are sold in many premium high street shops in the UK and internationally
description: Product Description Helping you create precious memories for over 25 years Gold & White Number Candles Cake Decoration to Celebrate the Milestone Birthday Celebrate a special 40th in style with these gold and white number candles. The elegant dipped design adds a luxe touch to any cake. Includes wooden picks for easy use. Ideal for birthdays, anniversaries or milestone moments that deserve a little extra shine.
